data.title: Capri Holdings Stock Drops By Half After Judge Blocks Tapestry Merger
data.description: Capri Holdings shares are tanking in Thursday's after-hours session following reports that a judge has blocked the company's pending merger with Tapestry.

data.title: Coursera Shares Fall After Q3 Results, Lower FY24 Revenue Guidance
data.description: Coursera shares are trading lower after the company reported its third-quarter results after Thursday's closing bell. Here's a look at the details from the report.
